Demos

Project write-ups and deep-dives

  • Vol. 01 Healthcare NLP / LLMs

    Healthcare RAG LLM System

    Optimizing document splits and retrieval parameters for clinical question-answering

    Sentence-aware splitting outperforms traditional character-based splitting — and Split Length, Top-K, and Window Size each materially change retrieval quality in clinical document analysis.
